sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 123:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 123:1
items.html: When the light of Dalet in the Hey from the coupling of ZON of Bina expands to Malchut. This is so because the screen has been entirely refined from there from all its coarseness until it equalized with the phase of Malchut of the Rosh, which is considered that it rose to the Rosh, to the Emanator. At that time, all the lights departed from the Partzuf. (Inner Light, Item‎ 46)
